AMEND AND RECOMMIT TO CORPORATIONS, AUTHORITIES AND COMMISSIONS
AMEND (T) AND RECOMMIT TO CORPORATIONS, AUTHORITIES AND COMMISSIONS

Title: Establishes a usage monitor program
Summary: Requires certain utility corporations and the Long Island power authority to establish a meter usage monitor program for the purposes of notifying residential customers when energy usage exceeds a cost or usage threshold in a given billing period determined by the residential customer.
LawCode: Add §39-a, Pub Serv L; add Art 5 Title 1-A §1020-nn, Pub Auth L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the public service law and the public authorities law, in relation to requiring certain utility corporations and the Long Island power authority to establish a meter usage monitoring program
